title: ulex minor
intro: Ulex minor, also known as the dwarf gorse or lesser gorse, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ulex minor include treating digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Ulex minor is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be made into a tincture or added to salves and ointments for topical use.
